Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Tony Hoare has died 1526 upvotes, 200 comments
  2. U+237C ⍼ Is Azimuth 149 upvotes, 16 comments
  3. Mesh over Bluetooth LE, TCP, or Reticulum 36 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Exploring the ocean with Raspberry Pi–powered marine robots 48 upvotes, 7 comments
  5. Show HN: How I topped the HuggingFace open LLM leaderboard on two gaming GPUs 294 upvotes, 86 comments
  6. Invoker Commands API 59 upvotes, 12 comments
  7. Zig – Type Resolution Redesign and Language Changes 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Universal vaccine against respiratory infections and allergens 113 upvotes, 39 comments
  9. Intel Demos Chip to Compute with Encrypted Data 223 upvotes, 87 comments
  10. The Gervais Principle, or the Office According to “The Office” (2009) 290 upvotes, 124 comments
  11. Open Weights isn't Open Training 80 upvotes, 28 comments
  12. FFmpeg-over-IP – Connect to remote FFmpeg servers 128 upvotes, 51 comments
  13. Networking with agents: Put them in the right conversations with Tailscale 17 upvotes, 3 comments
  14. Bippy: React Internals Toolkit 19 upvotes, 4 comments
  15. EQT eyes potential $6B sale of Linux pioneer SUSE, sources say 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  16. Tell HN: Apple development certificate server seems down? 66 upvotes, 26 comments
  17. Online age-verification tools for child safety are surveilling adults 553 upvotes, 304 comments
  18. SSH Secret Menu 60 upvotes, 24 comments
  19. Cloudflare crawl endpoint 130 upvotes, 66 comments
  20. Mother of All Grease Fires (1994) 28 upvotes, 10 comments
  21. Launch HN: RunAnywhere (YC W26) – Faster AI Inference on Apple Silicon 184 upvotes, 105 comments
  22. Meta acquires Moltbook 426 upvotes, 279 comments
  23. Rebasing in Magit 187 upvotes, 124 comments
  24. Debian decides not to decide on AI-generated contributions 287 upvotes, 213 comments
  25. Agents that run while I sleep 240 upvotes, 193 comments
  26. After outages, Amazon to make senior engineers sign off on AI-assisted changes 454 upvotes, 399 comments
  27. Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world 342 upvotes, 328 comments
  28. RISC-V Is Sloooow 174 upvotes, 165 comments
  29. Launch HN: Didit (YC W26) – Stripe for Identity Verification 52 upvotes, 51 comments
  30. Roblox is minting teen millionaires 65 upvotes, 67 comments

Last generated 10:30am, 11 March 2026. Source here.
